name: waypoint-guest-app
description: Example app showing the ideal Waypoint hosting-platform shape with TanStack Start, Cloudflare Workers, Better Auth, D1, and typed API contracts.

scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run check-types && bun run test
scripts.deploy: API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 PUBLIC_APP_NAME='Waypoint Guest' PUBLIC_APP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 APP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=dev-secret bun way deploy all --dry-run --api local --env dev
scripts.doctor: API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 PUBLIC_APP_NAME='Waypoint Guest' PUBLIC_APP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 APP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=dev-secret bun way doctor --api local
scripts.logs: bun way logs --api local --state local --project waypoint-guest-app
